name: Restrict grilling to the operator-facing owning Actor

elements.name: Actor boundary approved
elements.documentation: Begin from the operator-approved outcome and prescribed verification sequence without reopening alignment.

elements.name: Capture live maintainer RED
elements.documentation: Preserve the live event-triggered maintainer transcript that reopened alignment for its bounded assignment.

elements.name: Add Actor-boundary regression Check
elements.documentation: Add a focused mechanical Check that requires both the owner-only trigger and the bounded-assignment return path.

elements.name: Run Check against pre-change Skill
elements.documentation: Execute the focused regression Check before editing the grilling Skill.

elements.name: Regression Check RED?
elements.documentation: Proceed only when the Check fails on the live Actor-boundary defect.

elements.name: No reproducible regression
elements.documentation: Stop if the focused Check does not fail against the pre-change Skill.

elements.name: Encode the owner-only grilling boundary
elements.documentation: Apply the smallest skill-centered correction: only the operator-facing owning agent invokes grilling, while bounded non-owning Actors return new decisions or scope gaps to their owner.

elements.name: Enter verification
elements.documentation: Join initial implementation and in-scope repair paths before rerunning the complete affected verification sequence.

elements.name: Run Skill Creator validation
elements.documentation: Validate the edited grilling Skill with the Skill Creator validator.

elements.name: Run affected and full Checks
elements.documentation: Run the focused regression, affected Skill checks, full Repository shell harnesses, BPMN pipeline tests, and diff hygiene.

elements.name: Forward-test a bounded delegate
elements.documentation: Use a fresh delegate context to verify that a bounded assignment is treated as aligned and does not trigger grilling.

elements.name: Forward-test an operator-facing owner
elements.documentation: Use a fresh owner-facing context to verify that genuinely new consequential work still triggers grilling.

elements.name: Checks and forward-tests green?
elements.documentation: Repair only confirmed in-scope boundary defects and repeat the affected verification sequence.

elements.name: Repair an in-scope boundary defect
elements.documentation: Apply only the smallest causal correction supported by a failed Check or forward-test.

elements.name: Accept the Actor-boundary wording
elements.documentation: The operator confirms the observable behavior: owner-facing agents align new work; bounded non-owning agents execute or return new decisions and scope gaps.

elements.name: Operator accepts behavior?
elements.documentation: Withhold acceptance when the operator observes a boundary mismatch.

elements.name: Return for boundary correction
elements.documentation: Stop the green handoff when UAT exposes an unresolved Actor-boundary gap.

elements.name: Complete qq Change delivery
elements.documentation: Invoke the inherited independent review, one-PR publication, final Checks, Task finalization, and operator handoff procedure.

elements.name: Green PR ready
elements.documentation: End at the reviewed, accepted, green pull-request handoff boundary.
